en: We're back to that? Are we back there?
What about the past couple of days? They happened, you know?
I know that they happened, and they were wonderful.
But they were also very irresponsible.
I have a fiancé waiting for me at a hotel who's going to be crushed when he finds out what I did.
ko: 그가 내가 한 일을 알게 되면 상처받을 거야.

en: So you make love to me, and then you go back to your husband?
ko: 그래서 나와 사랑을 나누고, 다시 남편에게 돌아가는 거야?

en: Was that your plan? Was that a test that I wouldn't pass?
ko: 그게 네 계획이었어? 내가 통과하지 못한 시험이야?

en: No, I made a promise to a man. He gave me a ring, and I gave him my word.
And your word is shot to hell now, don't you think? I don't know. I'll find out when I talk to him.
This is not about keeping your promise, and it's not about following your heart.
It's about security. What is that supposed to mean? Money!
What are you talking... He's got a lot of money! Now I hate you, you smelly bastard!
Well, I hate you. If you leave here, I hate you.
ko: 나도 너를 싫어해. 여기 떠나면, 정말 싫어.

en: What if anyone paid any attention to anything that's been happening to me?
ko: 나는 내게 일어난 일에 전혀 신경 쓰지 않고 있어.
